Geremy Frey was a knight of House Frey. The tenth-born son of Lord Walder Frey, and fifth son by his third wife Lady Amarei Crakehall. He was married to Carolei Waynwood and had two children, Sandor and Cynthea Frey.

History[ ]

Geremy drowned.[2]
